summary: Tested all new UX features for Cactus card game. All 49 backend tests passed (2 skipped). Card reveal countdown with 5s delay and progress bar working. Round summary popup structure verified in code. Admin rights for Rmng users confirmed in database.

admin_rights_for_rmng.details: Both Rmng accounts (Romain.mignot14@gmail.com and romain.mignot14@gmail.com) have is_admin: true in MongoDB

round_summary_popup.details: Dialog opens when phase='round_summary', shows winner, all scores, and 'Lancer la manche X' button for creator only

start_next_round_action.details: Backend correctly rejects action when not in round_summary phase. Creator-only check implemented.

card_reveal_countdown.details: 5-second countdown with 'Mémorisez la carte! Xs' text and progress bar. isRevealingCard state prevents multiple reveals.

deck_recycling.details: draw_deck action (lines 655-663) keeps top discard, shuffles rest into deck when deck empty

num_rounds_config.details: Slider in create game dialog shows 'Nombre de manches', value stored in room.config.num_rounds

critical_code_review_comments: Round summary popup correctly shows creator-only button with conditional render (lines 963-974)
Card reveal countdown uses setInterval with proper cleanup in useEffect return
Deck recycling keeps top discard card to ensure game continuity
context_for_next_testing_agent: All UX improvements verified: (1) Admin rights for Rmng users confirmed in DB, (2) Round summary popup has correct structure with winner/scores/next-round-button, (3) Card reveal has 5s countdown with progress bar, (4) isRevealingCard state blocks multiple reveals, (5) Deck recycling logic keeps top discard card. The round_summary phase can only be triggered by completing a full round with cactus call, which requires manual gameplay testing.

ui_screenshots: Card reveal dialog with 'Mémorisez la carte! 5s' countdown and progress bar visible
Game transitions to playing phase after reveals complete
verification_notes.database_verification: MongoDB query confirmed Rmng users have is_admin: true
